raw_response: The Anker Nano 67W charger is an excellent choice for your travel needs due to its compact and foldable design, making it easy to carry in a pocket or bag. With GaN technology and PPS support, it offers fast charging speeds for both USB-C devices. Although it gets warm under full load and doesn't include cables, the high-quality build and brand familiarity make it worth the investment within your budget.
